---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem It Solves

What user pain or gap does this address? Why does it matter?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can — UI flows, API changes, data model changes, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Mockups, related issues, prior art from other tools, or any other context.
